ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aerial_vehicles" (
  "aav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AAV */,
  "aav_name" TEXT /* Name of the AAV */,
  "aav_type" TEXT /* Type of AAV (e.g., quadcopter, hexacopter) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the AAV */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the AAV */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the AAV */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number for the AAV */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the AAV was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the AAV (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the control software installed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the AAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aav_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AAV that flew */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in seconds */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot (if applicable) */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., test, research, surveillance) */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the flight */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the flight */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight plan associated with the flight */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_flight_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_plan_id") REFERENCES flight_plans ("flight_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aav_id FOREIGN KEY ("aav_id") REFERENCES aerial_vehicles ("aav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the data point in seconds */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Frame number of the data point */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the AAV */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the AAV */,
  "size_inv" REAL /* Inverse size of the AAV */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the AAV in degrees */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the AAV in degrees */,
  "thrust" REAL /* Thrust of the AAV */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle of the AAV in degrees */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the AAV */,
  "velocity_x" REAL /* Velocity in the X direction */,
  "velocity_y" REAL /* Velocity in the Y direction */,
  "velocity_z" REAL /* Velocity in the Z direction */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the AAV */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the communication link */,
  "gps_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the GPS signal */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the telemetry data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telemetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this command belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the command in seconds */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., thrust, roll, pitch) */,
  "command_value" REAL /* Value of the command */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the command (e.g., sent, acknowledged, executed) */,
  "command_source" TEXT /* Source of the command (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, faulty) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this data belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor this data comes from */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the data point in seconds */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sensor data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plans" (
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight plan */,
  "aav_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AAV this flight plan belongs to */,
  "flight_plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight plan */,
  "flight_plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the flight plan */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the flight plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flight plan was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the flight plan */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flight plan was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight plan (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the flight plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_aav_id FOREIGN KEY ("aav_id") REFERENCES aerial_vehicles ("aav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plan_waypoints" (
  "waypoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waypoint */,
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight plan this waypoint belongs to */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the waypoint */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the waypoint */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the waypoint */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the waypoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waypoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plan_waypoints_flight_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_plan_id") REFERENCES flight_plans ("flight_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message describing the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
